data.title: [fix-bug]: ESCALATED agents dispatched 'concurrently' but run serially — missing run_in_background
data.description:
## Incident Overview
The fix-bug SKILL.md ESCALATED investigation path says 'Dispatch Agents 1, 2, and 3 concurrently — dispatch all three before awaiting any result.' However, the orchestrator uses the Agent tool without run_in_background: true, so each dispatch blocks until the sub-agent completes. The agents run serially (A1 finishes -> A2 starts -> A3 starts) instead of in parallel, tripling ESCALATED investigation time.

## Expected Behavior
All three agents (Web Researcher, History Analyst, Code Tracer) launch simultaneously and run in true parallel, completing in the time of the slowest agent.

## Actual Behavior
Agents launch one at a time, each blocking until done before the next is dispatched.
